avoid: Removing the cuBLAS W@X call (since it dominates time)
Aggressive fusing that increases register pressure
evidence: Aggregate speedup 0.985, consistently slower on all shapes (3584, 4096, 4608)
Profile summary suggests memory bandwidth bottleneck
recommended_actions: Vary block size to find optimal for each shape
Use vectorized memory accesses (float4) when d is divisible by 4
Consider tile sizes to improve memory coalescing
Profile with nsight to identify kernel bottleneck
